The city of the conference can play a significant role in attracting attendees and influencing the overall experience of the event.
graphical_matching: City of conference domain Conference. City of conference range string.

lexical_matching: End_of_conference refers to the conclusion or end of a conference event. This typically includes the final sessions, closing remarks, and any post-conference activities or networking opportunities. It signifies the end of the formal agenda and marks the completion of the conference.
graphical_matching: End of conference range date time. End of conference domain Conference.
